trustBatch.title: Care you can trust for Hajj & Umrah
trustBatch.description: From Ihram-safe formulas to halal-certified standards, Sai brings together everything you need for comfortable, confident personal care throughout your pilgrimage.

items.label: Alcohol & Fragrance-Free
items.description: Formulated without alcohol or added perfumes. Gentle on skin and suitable for Ihram, prayer, and sensitive routines during pilgrimage.

hover.label: Cruelty-Free
hover.description: Never tested on animals. Ethically made with compassion at every stage of production and care.

items.label: Vegan
items.description: Crafted without animal-derived ingredients for conscious care. A thoughtful choice for everyday comfort on your Hajj and Umrah journey.

hover.label: Dermatologically Tested
hover.description: Rigorously tested under dermatological supervision. Gentle, effective formulas suited for daily pilgrimage use.

items.label: Halal
items.description: Developed in line with halal principles and trusted standards. Gives you reliable, worry-free personal care throughout your sacred journey.

hover.label: Travel-Friendly
hover.description: Compact, reliable, and easy to pack. Perfect companions for long flights, hotels, and life on the move.

items.label: Ihram-Safe
items.description: Designed to meet Ihram requirements at every step of pilgrimage. Stay comfortable and confident from travel to daily sacred rituals.

hover.label: Hot Climate Conditions
hover.description: Made to perform in heat and humidity. Keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable in demanding climates.

products.title: Skincare crafted with care
products.description: Explore our collection of premium formulas, each designed to deliver comfort, confidence, and visible results.

kit.name: German Care Complete Kit
kit.description: Everything you need for Hajj and Umrah in one kit. Anti-chafing cream for long walks in Ihram, a fragrance-free deodorant for daily freshness, SPF 50+ sunblock for the intense sun, and a gentle shampoo to refresh after hot, tiring days of travel.

keyBenefits: Complete Hajj and Umrah care in one travel-ready kit
All products are fragrance-free and Ihram-safe
Designed for long walking, heat, and daily freshness
Made in Germany with dermatologically tested formulas
details.howToUse: Use each product as directed on its packaging throughout your pilgrimage. Apply sunblock before outdoor rituals, use anti-chafing cream before long walks, refresh with deodorant and shampoo daily as needed.
details.ingredients: Each product in the kit has its own ingredient list on the packaging. All formulas are fragrance-free, alcohol-free, and developed for sensitive skin during pilgrimage.
details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Read individual product labels before use. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Suitable for use during Ihram. Store in a cool, dry place while traveling.

items.name: Anti-Chafing Body Cream
items.description: Prevents painful chafing during long hours of walking in Ihram. Its smooth, fragrance-free formula reduces skin-on-skin rubbing on the thighs and underarms, keeping you comfortable in hot climate throughout Hajj and Umrah.

keyBenefits: Reduces painful chafing during long tawaf and sa'i walks
Fragrance-free and safe to use while in Ihram
Soothes irritated skin in hot, humid pilgrimage conditions
Lightweight, non-greasy formula for all-day comfort
details.howToUse: Apply a thin layer to clean, dry skin on friction-prone areas such as inner thighs, underarms, and feet before walking. Reapply as needed during long periods of movement in heat.
details.ingredients: Aqua, Dimethicone, Glycerin, Zinc Oxide, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Cetearyl Alcohol, Tocopherol, Phenoxyethanol.
details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Fragrance-free and alcohol-free. Suitable for use during Ihram.

items.name: Deodorant Roller
items.description: Keeps you fresh through crowded, hot days of pilgrimage. This fragrance-free roller controls odor and gives long-lasting daily freshness without breaking Ihram, and its compact size is easy to carry while you travel.

keyBenefits: Long-lasting odor control without fragrance
Ihram-safe formula for daily use during pilgrimage
Compact roller ideal for travel and on-the-go freshness
Gentle on skin during hot, active days
details.howToUse: Roll evenly on clean, dry underarms once or twice daily. Allow to dry before dressing. Reapply after showering or heavy perspiration during long pilgrimage days.
details.ingredients: Aqua, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Glycerin, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Allantoin, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin.
details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Do not apply to broken or irritated skin. Fragrance-free and alcohol-free. Safe for use during Ihram.

items.name: Daily Use Shampoo
items.description: Gently cleanses away dust and sweat after long, tiring days of pilgrimage. Its mild, travel-friendly formula refreshes hair and soothes the scalp in hot weather, restoring daily comfort during Hajj and Umrah.

keyBenefits: Gently removes dust, sweat, and buildup after long days
Mild formula soothes the scalp in hot weather
Travel-friendly size for pilgrimage packing
Leaves hair feeling fresh, soft, and balanced
details.howToUse: Wet hair thoroughly. Apply a small amount, massage into scalp and hair, then rinse well. Use daily or as needed after long, dusty days of pilgrimage.
details.ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Panthenol, Citric Acid, Sodium Chloride, Phenoxyethanol.
details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Fragrance-free. Suitable for daily use during Hajj and Umrah.

items.name: Sunblock SPF 50+
items.description: Shields your skin during long hours of outdoor rituals under the harsh sun. Lightweight SPF 50+ with hyaluronic acid protects against sunburn and keeps skin hydrated while you walk in the intense heat of Hajj and Umrah.

keyBenefits: Broad-spectrum SPF 50+ protection for outdoor rituals
Hyaluronic acid helps keep skin hydrated in dry heat
Lightweight formula that absorbs without a heavy feel
Essential protection during long hours in direct sun
details.howToUse: Apply generously to exposed skin 15 minutes before going outdoors. Reapply every two hours, or after heavy sweating, especially during long outdoor rituals in Arafat and Mina.
details.ingredients: Aqua, Homosalate, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Glycerin, Hyaluronic Acid, Tocopherol, Phenoxyethanol.
details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Reapply frequently during prolonged sun exposure. Fragrance-free and suitable for sensitive skin during pilgrimage.

ourStory.title: Rooted in German care, built for everyday confidence
ourStory.description: Sai was founded on a simple belief. Everyone deserves access to high-quality skincare inspired by German standards of precision, safety, and care. From ingredient selection to final delivery, every step reflects our commitment to your well-being.

stats.description: Years of German-inspired skincare expertise and innovation.
Customer satisfaction rate across our product range.
Countries where Sai is trusted for daily skincare.
Average rating from verified customer reviews.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Find quick and helpful answers about Sai Brand, our products, shipping, and everything you need to know for a smooth and confident shopping experience.

items.question: Is it alcohol-free?
items.answer: Yes. Every product in the Hajj & Umrah Personal Care Kit is formulated without alcohol for gentle, everyday use during pilgrimage.

items.question: Is it fragrance-free?
items.answer: Yes. The kit is completely fragrance-free with no added perfumes, making it suitable for Ihram, prayer, and sensitive routines.

items.question: Is it suitable for Ihram?
items.answer: Yes. Our formulas are developed to meet Ihram requirements, so you can care for yourself with confidence throughout Hajj and Umrah.

items.question: What is included?
items.answer: The complete kit includes Daily Use Shampoo, Deodorant Roller, Sunblock SPF 50+, and Anti-Chafing Body Cream — everything you need in one set.

items.question: Is it travel-friendly?
items.answer: Yes. The kit is compact, easy to pack, and designed for long journeys, hot climates, and life on the move during pilgrimage.

items.question: Is it made in Germany?
items.answer: Yes. Sai products are made in Germany, reflecting German standards of quality, precision, and care in every formula.

moreItems.question: How can I buy the SAI Hajj & Umrah Care Kit?
moreItems.answer: You can order directly through our website by visiting the Products section and selecting the complete kit. Follow the checkout steps to place your order securely.

moreItems.question: Is the kit available in GCC countries?
moreItems.answer: Yes, the kit is available in GCC countries. Shipping options and delivery times may vary depending on your location.

moreItems.question: Do you offer international shipping?
moreItems.answer: Yes, Sai Brand offers international shipping to selected regions worldwide, depending on availability and logistics coverage.

moreItems.question: Can I order the kit before traveling for Hajj or Umrah?
moreItems.answer: Yes, we recommend ordering ahead of your travel dates to ensure your kit arrives in time for preparation and packing.

moreItems.question: Is the kit available for wholesale or distributors?
moreItems.answer: Yes, wholesale and distribution opportunities are available. Please contact us for volume pricing and partnership details.

moreItems.question: What are the shipping options and delivery times?
moreItems.answer: Shipping options and delivery estimates depend on your location. Standard delivery typically ranges from a few business days to several weeks for international orders.

moreItems.question: Who can I contact for GCC distribution or partnership inquiries?
moreItems.answer: For GCC distribution, wholesale, or partnership inquiries, please contact us at support@saibrand.com or use the Contact Us button on this page.
